programme.desc: Vanessa's visiting sister needs money for a donor egg so she can have a baby; Mike tries to pull a prank on Chuck Larabee.

programme.desc: Ryan convinces Kristin to let Boyd participate in the mutton busting competition; Eve's boyfriend tells her he doesn't want her wearing her JROTC uniform to the prom.

programme.desc: Vanessa is concerned for Eve's safety when she is asked to be the high school's first female kicker; Eve wonders is Justin is jealous of her achievement.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Boyd gets in trouble for starting a game of war at a birthday party; Vanessa turns to Mandy for fashion advice.

programme.desc: Donna misses one of her birth control pills; Kelso and Fez wait until Suzy (Alyson Hannigan) is gone to confess that they miss each other.

programme.desc: Brooke (Shannon Elizabeth) sees red when Kelso burns down the police academy; Pastor Dan (Billy Dee Williams) provides premarital counseling to Eric and Donna.

programme.desc: When Tim's (Tim Allen) first car is junked, Jill (Patricia Richardson) decides to find him an exact replica.

programme.desc: Mike helps Vanessa deal with empty nest syndrome; Kristin announces her pregnancy to the family, unintentionally upsetting Mandy.

programme.desc: While Cheryl is still in Florida, Jim donates all of the kids' old furniture and clothes to charity to clear the garage for a cigar lounge; Cheryl calls Jim with a special announcement.

programme.desc: With Cheryl on bed rest, Jim hosts Gracie's doll-themed party, turning the girly tea party into a wild squirt-gun fight.
